candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not ACT.
Non-current assets total, not ACT.
Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred over narrower 'Cash'.
Cash only; may exclude cash equivalents, so secondary to the exact label.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement balance, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Preferred label is 'Cash & Cash Equivalent'. 'Cash' added as lower-priority fallback because labels may vary across years.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred when explicit total exists.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Can be short-term financing debt, but less comprehensive than current borrowings if a cleaner total exists.
Most likely the clean current borrowings / short-term debt line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Short term of Long term Debt
candidates.why: Semantically relevant current portion of long-term debt, but appears less likely to be the main reported total than 'Debt to credit institutions'.

final_choice.row_label: Short term of Long term Debt

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it best matches short-term borrowings/current debt. Excludes lease-related rows.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed; selected the clear balance-sheet tax liability label.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.
Section header / subtotal-style line, less clean than explicit total net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment under construction
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not total.
Exact match for total assets.
Exact net operating cash flow line; preferred over pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not final OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred.
